name: vivreal-infra
description: Auto-invoked CROSS-CUTTING infrastructure & architecture knowledge skills for the Vivreal AWS stack — Lambda packaging/deploy + reserved-concurrency scaling (vivreal-lambda), API Gateway + Cognito + the Client API key authorizer, the Step Functions + Amplify site-deploy pipeline, IAM + Secrets Manager, MongoDB Atlas topology/ops, the media CDN + S3 + CloudFront signing, and the WebSocket real-time API. Spans repos (unlike the per-repo digests in vivreal-knowledge). Skills load passively from intent; install everywhere you do AWS/deploy/scaling/ops work.
